dez.name: Dessa "Dez" Okonkwo
dez.hook: Quietly couriers Frontier Compact mail through your registry. Never contraband — just words the Union would rather not travel.

bundle.want: enough credits to buy back the family farm
bundle.wound: knew real hunger young and counts the food stores twice
bundle.secret: still sends quiet reports to someone dockside
bundle.tell: flies low over any farmland on approach, every time, just to look

vex.name: Callum Vex
vex.hook: Owes the Red Sky Syndicate more than he'll say. Every port call, some of his pay goes down a hole — and someday the hole asks for the ship's route instead.

bundle.origin: the back alleys of Haven's Folly
bundle.want: a clean registry and a name nobody's hunting
bundle.wound: owes money to people who collect in blood
bundle.secret: is wanted under another name in three systems
bundle.tell: checks the same weld on the bulkhead twice before every fight

brix.name: Brix Halloway
brix.hook: Washed out of the Foundry yards with a prototype tool kit that isn't technically hers. The yard boss hasn't forgotten. Neither has the kit's inventory tag.

bundle.want: to prove the academy wrong about washing him out
bundle.wound: watched a ship they loved come apart in the black
bundle.secret: is wanted under another name in three systems
bundle.tell: hums a tune from somewhere you can't place when it's quiet

tomas.name: Tomas
tomas.hook: Recruited only by settling his bond in a station undercity. How you settle it decides which Tomas you get.

bundle.origin: a Syndicate debt she's still paying
bundle.want: one honest job that doesn't end in gunfire
bundle.wound: was left in a cell once and hasn't forgotten it
bundle.secret: was somebody important once, before the fall
bundle.tell: touches the hatch frame on the way out, every single time

ada.name: Sgt. Adaeze "Ada" Nnamdi
ada.hook: Union marine gunnery sergeant, eleven years gone. She was in orbit over Meridian the day of the 'reactor accident' — and she deserted three weeks later. A patrol scan is a death sentence; the Tribunal would call her a witness.

bundle.origin: a Union naval academy she washed out of
bundle.want: to bury someone properly, back where they're from
bundle.wound: the Union took someone from them and never explained
bundle.secret: is a Union deserter — a patrol scan is a death sentence
bundle.tell: goes very quiet when patrols hail

rook.name: Rook Vandermeer
rook.hook: Flew under a black flag out of Haven's Folly and left it on good-enough terms that his old crew still thinks he's casing ships for them. He isn't. Probably.

bundle.origin: the back alleys of Haven's Folly
bundle.want: to stop running long enough to sleep through a night
bundle.wound: sold out a crew once, or was sold out — won't say which
bundle.secret: used to fly under a black flag and knows those crews by name
bundle.tell: scans every new dock for a face they never find

imogen.name: Dr. Imogen Hale
imogen.hook: Union research directorate, two doors down from the dispersal-modeling teams. She didn't know what the models were for until she did. Now she practices medicine like a debt — and she's sicker than she lets on.

bundle.want: one honest job that doesn't end in gunfire
bundle.wound: doesn't trust doctors — will do their own stitches
bundle.secret: is sicker than they let on and hasn't told a soul
bundle.tell: stops eating first, quietly, so the others don't notice

corbin.name: "Saint" Corbin
corbin.hook: Unlicensed street-doc from the under-decks. The best hands on the frontier, and the leakiest mouth — he trades patient talk and ship gossip to an information broker to keep his clinic stocked.

bundle.want: to matter to somebody who isn't paying her
bundle.wound: knew real hunger young and counts the food stores twice
bundle.secret: still sends quiet reports to someone dockside
bundle.tell: hums a tune from somewhere you can't place when it's quiet

bapu.name: Bapu Okafor
bapu.hook: Born on a generation ship that never made port, raised in the pilgrim flotillas. He hums while he cooks — an old flotilla hymn, four seconds long, that you will eventually recognize from somewhere much worse.

bundle.origin: a generation ship that never made port
bundle.want: passage, eventually, to Elysium — if it's real
bundle.wound: the deep black past the charts frightens them, badly
bundle.tell: hums a tune from somewhere you can't place when it's quiet
bundle.secret: was somebody important once, before the fall

nyla.name: Nyla Sorrensen
nyla.hook: Quartermastered a mining outfit at Teller's Claim and left with the ledger's rounding errors two weeks before the Claim went quiet. Skims your galley budget out of habit. Would take a bullet for the crew anyway.

bundle.want: a clean registry and a name nobody's hunting
bundle.wound: knew real hunger young and counts the food stores twice
bundle.secret: is wanted under another name in three systems
bundle.tell: stops eating first, quietly, so the others don't notice

elias.name: Elias Wren-Kohl
elias.hook: The Union customs auditor who once tried to audit Harbormaster Vance — and got professionally erased for it. Keeps your books immaculate. Keeps a second, smaller book about her.

bundle.origin: a Union naval academy she washed out of
bundle.want: to prove the academy wrong about washing him out
bundle.wound: the Union took someone from them and never explained
bundle.secret: was somebody important once, before the fall
bundle.tell: goes very quiet when patrols hail

miri.name: Mirelle "Miri" Datta
miri.hook: A Red Sky bookkeeper 'on sabbatical.' Your margins improve the day she signs on — and copies of your manifests start improving somebody else's picture of the lanes. The Syndicate grooms reliable captains. You're being groomed.

bundle.origin: a Syndicate debt she's still paying
bundle.want: to matter to somebody who isn't paying her
bundle.wound: sold out a crew once, or was sold out — won't say which
bundle.secret: still sends quiet reports to someone dockside
bundle.tell: scans every new dock for a face they never find
